name: scantient
description: External API security scanner — scan production URLs for vulnerabilities

tools.name: get_app_status
tools.description: Get app security status and score

tools.name: get_findings
tools.description: Get security findings filtered by status/severity

tools.name: trigger_scan
tools.description: Run a security scan on an app

tools.name: get_security_score
tools.description: Get security score for app or portfolio

tools.name: get_remediation_metrics
tools.description: Get org-level fix rate and MTTR
